description: Reference output fingerprints for reference_flight1. Quality is guarded by the 24 reconstruction gates (acroFixture.test.ts); these detect unintended byte drift. Regenerated after tuning FC-quat-prior decorrelation (fcQuatPriorHz=1000, dyn-weight disabled by default after this gate caught catastrophic divergence at lower rates with dyn-weight enabled on an aggressive acro flight), DCS chi2-phi + bounded R-inflation, physics-informed baro inflation, and the resulting NIS-consistency re-tune (gpsPosSigma 2.5->2.8, gpsVelSigma 0.95->0.45, baroSigma 2.5->1.6).
